description.value:
Standard Racial Traits

  • Ability Score Modifiers: Ability Score Modifiers: Military Models are designed for combat leaving very little room for emotion and connecting to others. Thus Military models have a +2 to Strength, Dexterity and Constitution yet a -2 on Wisdom and Charisma.
  • Type: Androids are humanoids with the android subtype.
  • Size: Androids are Medium creatures, and they have no bonuses or penalties due to their size.
  • Base Speed: Androids have a base speed of 30 feet.
  • Languages: Cyborgs begin play speaking Common. Androids with high Intelligence can choose any languages they want (except secret languages, such as Druidic). See the Linguistics skill page for more information about these languages.

Senses Racial Traits

  • Ruthless Steel: Military Cyborgs can choose to your use their Strength modifier instead of Charisma on intimidate skill checks and in addition gain a +2 on intimidate checks.
  • Cold to the Touch : Military androids cold exterior often leads others in fear and distrust and thus suffer a -2 on diplomacy, Bluff and disguise checks.

Other Racial Traits

  • Heavy Weapons : A Military Cyborg can equip a one or two handed weapon on one arm as a full-round action. Such weapons are treated as wielded in one hand.
  • Constructed: For the purposes of effects targeting creatures by type (such as a ranger’s favored enemy and bane weapons), androids count as humanoid (chosen at character creation) and constructs. However Androids do not gain the same immunity as constructs and instead gain a +4 racial bonus on all saving throws against mind-affecting effects, paralysis, poison, and stun effects, are not subject to fatigue or exhaustion, and are immune to disease and sleep effects. Military cyborgs however do posses a soul and can be slain by death effects spells that target the androids soul (hellfire ray, Magic jar) and negative levels however they do not suffer any penalties from negative levels.
  • Cyborg body : Cyborg can heal using positive energy but it is only half as effective but can also be harmed by negative energy albeit they only take half damage by it. Cyborgs can be healed using spells or effects such as (Make Whole) or with a craft Construct check (DC 20) to heal 1 point of damage as a standard action, healing an additional point for every 5 points you beat the DC.
  • Jet charge :When Charging a Military cyborg gains a +1 additional bonus on attack and damage rolls and a +2 bonus on CMB rolls on on bullrush or overrun checks.

  • Alternate Racial Traits

  • Self Destruct Sequence: Upon dropping to zero a Military cyborg may choose to initiate a self destruct sequence that requires no action that deals 2d6+1 damage for each hit die in a 10ft radius. Creatures in the area may attempt a reflex for half damage (DC 10 + 1/2 character level Plus Con Modifier). Characters unaware of Self Destruct Sequence (DC 25 Engineering) take a -4 penalty to their reflex save. This effect can be set up to happen immediately within 1d4+1 rounds, or in minutes up to 24 hours using 1 minute increments. Self Destruct Sequence does leave enough parts for a Military cyborg to be resurrected using raise dead. (This Replaces Jet Charge)

contextNotes.text:
+[[4]] Racial vs Mind Affecting, Paralysis, Poison, Stun
Immune to Disease, Sleep and Emotion-based Effects
